next_action: Reject premature vector database or graph-store work, keep file-backed source-backed memory as the auditable substrate, and run the bounded benchmark runner output-capture/baseline-scope repair before adding storage infrastructure.
overclaim_boundary: File-backed memory is not the breakthrough by itself, and a benchmark suite still must not claim lift until clean live evidence passes the gate.
rationale: The current gap is not a missing vector store. Goal 027 shows the latest live-suite evidence is dirty and not expansion-ready, and goal 028 routes the next step to output-capture and baseline-scope repair before new memory storage infrastructure.
